blurb: Law-firm AI/regulatory practice. Launch coverage uses first-party European AI Continent Action Plan analysis.

hiring.note: Official A&O Shearman UK careers page verified.

publications.title: Where are we on copyright and AI in the UK?
publications.summary: A&O Shearman opinion piece taking stock of the UK copyright-and-AI debate, including the text-and-data-mining question and the government's proposed approach following the December 2024 consultation.

publications.title: DSIT publishes consultation on empowering individuals through data intermediaries
publications.summary: A&O Shearman analyses DSIT's 2026 consultation proposing legislative and non-legislative options to support a trusted UK market for data intermediaries (open until 31 Aug 2026).

publications.title: The European Commission publishes its AI Continent Action Plan
publications.summary: A&O Shearman analyses the European Commission’s AI Continent Action Plan, including the AI Office service desk and policy measures intended to support AI development and compliance.

publications.title: EU AI Act: obligations for high-risk AI systems
publications.summary: A&O Shearman explains provider and deployer obligations for high-risk AI systems under the EU AI Act ahead of the 2 August 2026 application date.

publications.title: EU AI Act: limited-risk AI compliance requirements
publications.summary: A&O Shearman maps Article 50 transparency duties for chatbots, synthetic content and deepfakes under the EU AI Act.
